title.zh: 气血不足怎么调理？中医补气补血全攻略
title.en: How to Tonify Qi and Blood? Complete TCM Guide

description.zh: 详细介绍气血不足的表现、原因和调理方法，包括饮食、穴位和生活习惯
description.en: Detailed guide to Qi and Blood deficiency - manifestations, causes, and conditioning methods

zh.text: 气血是人体生命活动的基础，气为血之帅，血为气之母。气血不足会导致多种健康问题，如疲劳乏力、面色萎黄、头晕心悸等。了解如何调理气血，是中医养生的重要内容。

items: 面色苍白或萎黄
说话声音低弱
容易疲劳，稍微活动就累
气短懒言，不想说话
自汗，容易出汗
抵抗力差，容易感冒
舌淡苔白
面色萎黄或苍白
头晕眼花
心悸失眠
手足麻木
女性月经量少或延期
头发干枯脱落
舌淡苔白，脉细
先天不足：体质虚弱，先天禀赋不足
后天失养：饮食不规律，营养摄入不足
过度劳累：长期过度工作或运动
情志失调：长期压力大，情绪不稳定
久病耗损：慢性疾病消耗气血
失血过多：外伤出血、月经量多等
黄芪：补气升阳，固表止汗
党参：补中益气，健脾养胃
山药：补脾益肺，固肾益精
红枣：补气养血，安神健脾
鸡肉：温中补气，益精填髓
牛肉：补脾胃，益气血
当归：补血活血，调经止痛
阿胶：补血止血，滋阴润燥
桂圆：补心脾，益气血
黑芝麻：补肝肾，益精血
菠菜：养血止血，滋阴润燥
猪肝：补血养肝，明目

zh.text: 位置：小腿外侧，膝盖下3寸。
位置：大腿内侧，膝盖内侧端上2寸。
位置：小腿内侧，内踝尖上3寸。

zh.title: 当归黄芪炖鸡
zh.instructions:
1. 鸡肉切块焯水
2. 当归、黄芪洗净
3. 所有材料放入炖盅
4. 炖煮1.5小时
5. 温服，每周2-3次
6. 补气养血，适合气血两虚者

items: 规律作息：早睡早起，保证充足睡眠
适度运动：散步、太极、八段锦等温和运动
情绪调节：保持心情平和，避免过度思虑
饮食调理：均衡饮食，多吃补气血食物
避免过度：不过度劳累，不过度减肥

zh.text: 温馨提示：气血调理需要循序渐进，不可急于求成。严重气血不足者应在医师指导下调理，配合药物治疗效果更佳。

en.text: Qi and Blood are the foundation of life activities. Qi commands Blood, Blood nourishes Qi. Qi-Blood deficiency causes many health issues like fatigue, sallow complexion, dizziness, palpitations. Understanding how to regulate Qi and Blood is essential for TCM wellness.

items: Pale or sallow complexion
Weak voice
Easy fatigue, tired with slight activity
Short breath, reluctance to speak
Spontaneous sweating
Weak immunity, easy colds
Pale tongue with white coating
Sallow or pale complexion
Dizziness, blurred vision
Palpitations, insomnia
Numbness in hands and feet
Scanty or delayed menstruation
Dry, falling hair
Pale tongue, thin pulse
Congenital deficiency: Weak constitution from birth
Postnatal neglect: Irregular diet, poor nutrition
Overexertion: Long-term overwork or exercise
Emotional imbalance: Chronic stress, unstable emotions
Chronic illness: Diseases consuming Qi and Blood
Excessive blood loss: Trauma, heavy menstruation
Astragalus: Tonify Qi, raise Yang, secure exterior
Codonopsis: Tonify middle Qi, strengthen spleen
Yam: Tonify spleen and lung, secure kidney essence
Red dates: Tonify Qi and Blood, calm spirit
Chicken: Warm middle, tonify Qi
Beef: Tonify spleen-stomach, benefit Qi-Blood
Angelica: Tonify Blood, activate circulation
Donkey-hide gelatin: Tonify Blood, nourish Yin
Longan: Tonify heart-spleen, benefit Qi-Blood
Black sesame: Tonify liver-kidney, benefit essence-blood
Spinach: Nourish Blood, moisten dryness
Pork liver: Tonify Blood, nourish liver

en.text: Location: Outer lower leg, 3 cun below knee.
Point 2: Qihai (CV6) - Tonify Qi, secure foundation
Point 3: Xuehai (SP10) - Tonify and nourish Blood
Location: Inner thigh, 2 cun above inner knee end.
Point 4: Sanyinjiao (SP6) - Regulate Qi and Blood
Location: Inner lower leg, 3 cun above inner ankle.

en.title: Angelica Astragalus Chicken Stew
en.instructions:
1. Cut chicken, blanch
2. Wash angelica and astragalus
3. Place all in stewing pot
4. Stew for 1.5 hours
5. Serve warm, 2-3 times weekly
6. Tonifies Qi and Blood - for Qi-Blood deficiency

items: Regular routine: Early to bed, early to rise, sufficient sleep
Moderate exercise: Walking, Tai Chi, Ba Duan Jin
Emotional balance: Stay calm, avoid excessive worry
Dietary care: Balanced diet, eat Qi-Blood tonifying foods
Avoid excess: Don't overwork, don't extreme dieting

en.text: Note: Qi-Blood regulation needs gradual progress. Those with severe deficiency should consult a physician for combined treatment with medication for best results.
